title: Change Your Brain, Change Your Life
author: Daniel G. Amen
subline: The brain is the organ of change.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A brain SPECT scan abstracted to 9 glowing 'lobes'. 8 are dim (low activity), 1 is bright RED (the one that lights up when you change). The lobes are arranged as a coronal cross-section. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 950)">
    <!-- Brain outline (hairline) -->
    <path d="M -500 0 Q -520 -200 -380 -300 Q -200 -380 0 -380 Q 200 -380 380 -300 Q 520 -200 500 0 Q 520 200 380 320 Q 200 380 0 380 Q -200 380 -380 320 Q -520 200 -500 0 Z" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- Central fissure -->
    <line x1="0" y1="-380" x2="0" y2="380" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.6"/>
    <!-- 8 dim lobes: 4 on each side, varying sizes -->
    <g fill="#1a1a1a" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1">
      <circle cx="-220" cy="-180" r="100"/>
      <circle cx="-260" cy="50" r="110"/>
      <circle cx="-200" cy="240" r="90"/>
      <circle cx="-340" cy="-50" r="60"/>
      <circle cx="220" cy="-180" r="100"/>
      <circle cx="260" cy="50" r="110"/>
      <circle cx="200" cy="240" r="90"/>
      <circle cx="340" cy="-50" r="60"/>
    </g>
    <!-- 1 BRIGHT RED LOBE — pre-frontal cortex, where change begins -->
    <g>
      <circle cx="0" cy="-280" r="80" fill="#fc1c46"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="-280" r="80" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Whisper label for the lit lobe -->
    <text x="100" y="-280" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em">PREFRONTAL CORTEX</text>
    <text x="100" y="-260" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="400" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.04em" opacity="0.7">— the change center</text>
    <!-- Top label -->
    <text x="0" y="-440" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">SPECT SCAN · CORONAL VIEW</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A brain SPECT scan abstracted to 9 lobes: 8 in dim graphite (low activity), 1 in BRIGHT RED (the prefrontal cortex, the change center). The only chromatic element. 280px mixed-case 'Change Your Brain, / Change Your Life' title in weight 500 sits at the bottom. The visual thesis: change is biological, located in a specific part of the brain that lights up when you do the work.
